action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 22 achieved a new best mae_60min=3.6387 using best2.pt with per-step naive blending (alphas.npy). We have ~6 minutes and 8 iterations left. Analysis: The alphas were originally searched on a coarse 0.05 grid. A finer 0.01 grid may find better blending weights, especially for the critical late horizons. Also, the validation script did not clip predictions to >=0 before searching, while predict.py does clip; aligning this should give more realistic alphas. Decision: Update compute_blend.py to (1) clip predictions to >=0 before alpha search, (2) search alpha in 0.01 increments, and (3) always save alphas.npy. Run this recomputation and immediately submit best2.pt for evaluation in the same iteration.
